name: list_files
description: List files and directories at the given path. Returns file names, sizes, and permissions.

path.description: Directory path to list. Defaults to root '/'.

recursive.description: Whether to list files recursively in subdirectories. Default false.

name: read_file
description: Read the content of a file at the given path.

path.description: Full path of the file to read.

name: write_file
description: Write content to a file. Creates the file if it does not exist, overwrites if it does.

path.description: Full path of the file to write.

content.description: Content to write to the file.

name: delete_file
description: Delete a file or directory at the given path. This action is irreversible.

path.description: Full path of the file or directory to delete.

name: copy_file
description: Copy a file from a source path to a destination path.

source.description: Full path of the source file.

name: execute_script
description: Execute a script file at the given path. The script must have execute permissions.

path.description: Full path of the script to execute.

args.description: Command-line arguments to pass to the script.
